the price difference between m4 (demo unit) vs m5(fresh unit) is not fare comparison in terms of price, rather m4 vs m5 fresh difference would be better. as m4 fresh is around 97k (256 gb) and m5 is 1.19 lakhs (512gb) if we go on to factor the price of 256 gb in m4 than price gap reduces significantly hence m5 would be better. so shelling out 35k or buy a demo unit should have been told in the vid. as demo units are the ones used for demo purposes and 35k is because-of that. used unit.

watching the video on my 1.4 year old macbook air m3 16/512 gb and the fact is i still haven’t used even 30% of its potential🙂

believe it or not, you must also have felt it that all of a sudden everyone started doing good reviews for air(no doubt the product is good). i believe its apples pr team doing these paid partnership and the sad part is no one is mentioning it, so it almost feel like its natural video. it is to increase the sales of apple air model as indians finds value for money. neo is not worth its price and pro feels overpriced and air is in the sweet spot where it does not have all the features of pro but far better than neo. and any first time buyer will go for it if he is not much into tech otherwise windows also offers almost same if not better functionality at the price range. already india is the largest market for their air laptops.
